channel.title: GitHub Lua Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Lua in GitHub

item.title: LuaLS/lua-language-server
item.description: A language server that offers Lua language support - programmed in Lua

item.title: Saghen/blink.cmp
item.description: Performant, batteries-included completion plugin for Neovim

item.title: stevearc/oil.nvim
item.description: Neovim file explorer: edit your filesystem like a buffer

item.title: yetone/avante.nvim
item.description: Use your Neovim like using Cursor AI IDE!

item.title: zbirenbaum/copilot.lua
item.description: Fully featured & enhanced replacement for copilot.vim complete with API for interacting with Github Copilot

item.title: akinsho/toggleterm.nvim
item.description: A neovim lua plugin to help easily manage multiple terminal windows

item.title: koreader/koreader
item.description: An ebook reader application supporting PDF, DjVu, EPUB, FB2 and many more formats, running on Cervantes, Kindle, Kobo, PocketBook and Android devices

item.title: epwalsh/obsidian.nvim
item.description: Obsidian 🤝 Neovim

item.title: williamboman/mason-lspconfig.nvim
item.description: Extension to mason.nvim that makes it easier to use lspconfig with mason.nvim.

item.title: m4xshen/hardtime.nvim
item.description: Establish good command workflow and quit bad habit

item.title: apache/apisix
item.description: The Cloud-Native API Gateway

item.title: mfussenegger/nvim-lint
item.description: An asynchronous linter plugin for Neovim complementary to the built-in Language Server Protocol support.

item.title: stevearc/conform.nvim
item.description: Lightweight yet powerful formatter plugin for Neovim

item.title: Mintimate/oh-my-rime
item.description: The Simple Config Template Of Rime By Mintimate. QQ Chat-Group: 703260572

item.title: xmake-io/xmake
item.description: 🔥 A cross-platform build utility based on Lua

item.title: nvim-lua/kickstart.nvim
item.description: A launch point for your personal nvim configuration

item.title: L3MON4D3/LuaSnip
item.description: Snippet Engine for Neovim written in Lua.

item.title: nvimtools/none-ls.nvim
item.description: null-ls.nvim reloaded / Use Neovim as a language server to inject LSP diagnostics, code actions, and more via Lua.

item.title: rcarriga/nvim-dap-ui
item.description: A UI for nvim-dap

item.title: opentibiabr/canary
item.description: Canary Server 13.x for OpenTibia community.
